name: Sweden
description: Sweden is a global innovator with top-ranked universities and a strong focus on sustainability and technology. Many programs are English-taught, and the country offers a high standard of living.

tuitionFees.undergraduate: Once a student has paid the tuition fees, we need to apply online through the portal of The Swedish Migration Agency for visa on the link below –
tuitionFees.postgraduate: After submission of the form and payment of visa fees online, schedule an appointment by emailing the Embassy of Sweden at Chanakyapuri, New Delhi. The details are provided as below:
tuitionFees.phd: Fully funded through employment contracts at Swedish universities

requirements: Completed residence permit application via Migrationsverket

languageRequirements.notes: Most master's programs taught in English

faqs.question: Is it easy to get a student visa for Sweden?
faqs.answer: With proper documentation and financial proof, obtaining a student visa for Sweden is straightforward. MVR Consultants can guide you through the entire process.

faqs.question: What are the tuition fees in Sweden?
faqs.answer: Tuition fees vary by university and program. Contact our counselors for program-specific fee structures.

faqs.question: Can I work while studying?
faqs.answer: Most countries allow international students to work part-time during term time. Specific hours and conditions depend on the country's immigration rules.

faqs.question: Are there scholarships available for Indian students?
faqs.answer: Yes, many universities and governments offer merit-based and need-based scholarships for international students. Ask our counselors for scholarship matching.
